description: Implement basic heap sort algorithm for integer slices
steps: Implement heapify function to build max heap from unsorted array
Implement heap sort function that sorts integer slice in-place
Add handling for empty slices and single element slices
Implement sort function that extracts max element and rebuilds heap

description: Implement generic heap sort using Go generics (sort.Interface)
steps: Create a heap sort type that implements sort.Interface
Implement Len, Less, and Swap methods
Add support for custom comparison functions

description: Write comprehensive unit tests for heap sort implementation
steps: Test sorting of already sorted array
Test sorting of reverse sorted array
Test sorting of array with duplicate values
Test sorting of empty and single element arrays
Test sorting of random arrays and verify correctness
